retry_reason: The function is a cleanup action that releases references; retrying after a failure would indicate a double-release, which is unsafe.
contract_summary: This function is a put-wrapper that releases all IIO channels stored in the axp288_fg_info structure by calling iio_channel_release on each valid (non-NULL, non-error) channel. It is typically used as a devm action or during driver removal to properly decrement reference counts and free resources. Callers must call this function exactly once during cleanup; after calling it, the channel array must not be used further. The function is safe to call if some channels were never allocated or are error pointers, as it checks each pointer before releasing.
